calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-20-2009 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff Raymond Grinsell is present.
Brenda Cruz Keith appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendants Juan Guzman and Nelly Guzman are present.
Misti Schmidt representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set.

Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweizer, Clerks Maria Olopernes-Pena/Dennis Vegas, Not Reported. (218)
